title: Customize Logo on Publicly Shared Board
excerpt: Our team is exploring publicly shared boards to give our clients an insight into timelines and other key data that we keep track of in Monday. It would be really great if we could add our company logo, our client’s logo,…

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team is exploring publicly shared boards to give our clients an insight into timelines and other key data that we keep track of in Monday. It would be really great if we could add our company logo, our client’s logo, or ideally both, to the page that gets generated when a public link is created.

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml: For anyone reading this thread, I did discover that if you use the embedded version of the URL is will open in full screen and remove the Monday.com logo in the top left.
